title: Transformer Models for Low-Resource African Languages: A Case Study in Yoruba and Igbo
excerpt: This paper presents a novel fine-tuning approach that improves machine translation accuracy by 47% for underrepresented African languages.
author: Dr. Aisha Bello
authorTitle: Lead AI Researcher, University of Lagos

title: Autonomous Agricultural Drones: Enhancing Food Security in Sub-Saharan Africa
excerpt: Deployment of low-cost autonomous drones using computer vision to optimize crop monitoring and reduce pesticide usage by up to 60%.
author: Engr. Olumide Adeyemi

title: AI-Driven Early Detection of Malaria Using Smartphone Microscopy
excerpt: A deep learning model achieving 96.4% accuracy in detecting malaria parasites from low-quality smartphone images in rural clinics.
author: Dr. Fatima Nkosi
authorTitle: Biomedical AI Specialist, University of Cape Town

title: Ethical Frameworks for Responsible AI Development in Africa
excerpt: Proposing a culturally grounded ethical framework tailored to African values, governance structures, and development priorities.
author: Prof. Naledi Khumalo
authorTitle: Professor of AI Ethics, University of Johannesburg
